name: Robert Glasper
description: American jazz pianist, composer and record producer
abstract: Robert Andre Glasper (born April 5, 1978) is an American pianist, record producer, songwriter, and musical arranger. His music embodies numerous musical genres, primarily centered around jazz.

interviews.title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016

about_quotes.speaker: David Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: I think it’s great that that stuff’s out there but I mean it’s just not the only stuff. ... I think it’s great, the Robert Glaspers of the world or the Makaya McCraven or who else, Kamasi Washington.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Alkyer
about_quotes.evidence: I think you’re going to see a lot more crossover kind of thing with like a Robert Glasper, along those lines.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Alkyer interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 10, 2020
